text_block_list.text:
King Halo has managed to leave quite a mark on
the Twinkle Series.

Together, we've successfully navigated the first
crucial three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Earth to Trainer. I need you with me here.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
We're in the middle of a meeting, you know? I
need you to focus.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I swear! You of all people should know there's no
time to be slacking off.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Spring is right around the corner, and it's bringing
the G1 races with it. As a first-rate Umamusume, I
have to go big, right?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Besides, I have people waiting for me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Everyone is looking forward to seeing the path
we'll create.
